title: ENFOQUE PARTICIPATIVO PARA APOYAR MEJOR A LOS AVICULTORES EN MATERIA DE BIOSEGURIDAD
description: A participatory approach guide designed to support poultry farmers in improving their biosecurity practices through moderated workshops and collaborative action planning. It outlines the structure, key benefits, and three-stage process applied in France under the NetPoulSafe project funded by Horizon 2020 to trigger and consolidate behavior change.
